ValidationRule.description: On Hold Until is required when Lead Status is Held for Reapproach.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (AND( ISPICKVAL( Status , "Held for Reapproach"), ISBLANK( On_Hold_Until__c ) )) && $Setup.rh2__PS_Settings__c.rh2__Run_Validation_Rule__c
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Add On Hold Until date before changing status to Held for Reapproach.
